            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "              {/* Loading indicator during file upload/preview */}",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "              {importing &amp;&amp; importStep === 'preview' &amp;&amp; !importPreview &amp;&amp; (",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;div className=\"text-center py-5\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;div className=\"spinner-border text-primary mb-3\" role=\"status\"&gt;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\frontend\\src\\pages\\ImportData.js",
        "range": {

          },

        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

              "startPosition": {

                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 8,
                "column": 7
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 8,
                "column": 7
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 8,
                "column": 20
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  const handleFileSelect = async (e) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    const file = e.target.files[0];",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!file) return;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    setImportFile(file);",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    setImportStep('preview');",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "    try {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "      setImporting(true);",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "      const formData = new FormData();",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "      formData.append('file', file);",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "      const endpoint = importType === 'companies' ",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "        ? '/api/companies/import/preview' ",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        : '/api/users/import/preview';",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "      const response = await api.post(endpoint, formData, {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        headers: {",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "          'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data'",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "      setImportPreview(response.data);",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "      setImportStep('preview');",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "      toast.error('Error previewing import: ' + (error.response?.data?.message || error.message));",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      setImportFile(null);",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      setImportStep('upload');",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    } finally {",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "      setImporting(false);",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "  const handleConfirmImport = async () =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 864
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4697839915752411
    },

        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;div className=\"container-xl\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "          &lt;div className=\"card\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "              {/* Import Type Selector */}",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "              {importStep === 'upload' &amp;&amp; (",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;div className=\"mb-4\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;label className=\"form-label\"&gt;Import Type&lt;/label&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;label className=\"form-selectgroup-item\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;input",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "                        type=\"radio\"",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "                        name=\"importType\"",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "                        value=\"companies\"",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "                        className=\"form-selectgroup-input\"",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "                        checked={importType === 'companies'}",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "                        onChange={(e) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "                          setImportType(e.target.value);",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "                          setImportFile(null);",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "                          setImportPreview(null);",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "                          setImportResults(null);",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "                          setPreviewFilter('all');",

          },
          {
            "text": "                        }}",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "                      /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;div className=\"form-selectgroup-label d-flex align-items-center p-3\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;div className=\"me-3\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;strong&gt;Companies&lt;/strong&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;div className=\"text-muted small\"&gt;Import company data from CSV, XLS, XLSX, or JSON files&lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {

          },

        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " (",
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;p className=\"mb-2\"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Required columns:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;ul className=\"mb-2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;account_no&lt;/strong&gt; - Account Number (unique identifier for matching)&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;parent_account_no&lt;/strong&gt; - Parent's account number (empty for top-level CORP)&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;company_name&lt;/strong&gt; - Company Name (required)&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;type&lt;/strong&gt; - Company type: CORP, SUB, or BRANCH (required)&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;active&lt;/strong&gt; - Active status: TRUE or FALSE&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;edi&lt;/strong&gt; - EDI enabled: TRUE or FALSE (if TRUE, email notifications disabled)&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "                          &lt;li&gt;&lt;strong&gt;primary_email&lt;/strong&gt; - Primary contact email (optional, creates notification contact)&lt;/li&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;/ul&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;p className=\"mb-2\"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Note:&lt;/strong&gt; Companies are matched by account_no. Existing companies will be updated.&lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;p className=\"mb-0 text-muted small\"&gt;Legacy column names (CUSTOMER, PARENT, CNME, TYPE) are also supported for backward compatibility.&lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;/&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "                    ) : (",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {

          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;div&gt;",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {
            "text": "              {/* Step 1: File Upload */}",

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\routes\\users.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 1993
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2167,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 2082,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 2082,
                "column": 1
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 2082,
                "column": 63
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 2083,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 1994
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2127
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Column mapping descriptions",
            "lineNumber": 2128
          },
          {
            "text": "    const columnMappings = {",
            "lineNumber": 2129
          },
          {
            "text": "      'id': 'Database ID (UUID) - Primary matching key. If provided, matches by ID first.',",
            "lineNumber": 2130
          },
          {
            "text": "      'name': 'User Name - Required',",
            "lineNumber": 2131
          },
          {
            "text": "      'email': 'Email Address - Required. Falls back to email matching if no ID.',",
            "lineNumber": 2132
          },
          {
            "text": "      'role': 'User Role - global_admin, administrator, manager, credit_senior, credit_controller, external_user, notification_contact',",
            "lineNumber": 2133
          },
          {
            "text": "      'active': 'Active Status - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2134
          },
          {
            "text": "      'all_companies': 'All Companies Access - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2135
          },
          {
            "text": "      'company_account_numbers': 'Company Account Numbers - Comma-separated list of account numbers',",
            "lineNumber": 2136
          },
          {
            "text": "      'send_invoice_email': 'Receive Invoice Emails - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2137
          },
          {
            "text": "      'send_invoice_attachment': 'Include Invoice Attachments - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2138
          },
          {
            "text": "      'send_statement_email': 'Receive Statement Emails - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2139
          },
          {
            "text": "      'send_statement_attachment': 'Include Statement Attachments - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2140
          },
          {
            "text": "      'send_email_as_summary': 'Send as Summary Email - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 2141
          },
          {
            "text": "      'send_import_summary_report': 'Receive Import Summary Reports - TRUE or FALSE'",
            "lineNumber": 2142
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 2143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2144
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.json({",
            "lineNumber": 2145
          },
          {
            "text": "      preview: previewData,",
            "lineNumber": 2146
          },
          {
            "text": "      summary,",
            "lineNumber": 2147
          },
          {
            "text": "      totalRows: rows.length,",
            "lineNumber": 2148
          },
          {
            "text": "      columnNames,",
            "lineNumber": 2149
          },
          {
            "text": "      columnMappings",
            "lineNumber": 2150
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 2151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2152
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 2153
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Error previewing user import:', error);",
            "lineNumber": 2154
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });",
            "lineNumber": 2155
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 2156
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 2157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2158
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 2159
          },
          {
            "text": " * Import users from CSV/XLS/XLSX file",
            "lineNumber": 2160
          },
          {
            "text": " * POST /api/users/import",
            "lineNumber": 2161
          },
          {
            "text": " * ",
            "lineNumber": 2162
          },
          {
            "text": " * Creates new users or updates existing ones.",
            "lineNumber": 2163
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Matches by ID first (if provided), then falls back to email",
            "lineNumber": 2164
          },
          {
            "text": " * - New users get a welcome email with temporary password",
            "lineNumber": 2165
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Email changes trigger validation flow (user must verify new email)",
            "lineNumber": 2166
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Companies are assigned by account number (referenceNo)",
            "lineNumber": 2167
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 2168
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.44116321206092834
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\frontend\\src\\pages\\ImportData.js",

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "const resetImport = ",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Redirect if not administrator",
            "lineNumber": 228

        "signatures": {},

          {
            "text": "async function processUserRowForPreview(row, rowNum, existingUsersMap, existingUsersByIdMap, existingCompaniesMap, manageableRoles) {",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1900
          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 1917
          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 1920
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 1921
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 1922
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1923
          },
          {
            "text": "    result.data = userData;",
            "lineNumber": 1924
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 1925
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1926
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 1927
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": " * Execute import endpoint",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "router.post('/', globalAdmin, upload.single('file'), async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "  const transaction = await sequelize.transaction();",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "      await transaction.rollback();",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No file uploaded' });",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rows = await parseImportFile(req.file);",
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get existing users and companies",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsers = await User.findAll({ transaction });",
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsersMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const user of existingUsers) {",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "text": "      existingUsersMap.set(user.email.toLowerCase(), user);",
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingCompanies = await Company.findAll({ transaction });",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingCompaniesMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const company of existingCompanies) {",
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (company.referenceNo) {",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "        existingCompaniesMap.set(company.referenceNo, company);",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "    const results = {",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "      created: 0,",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "      updated: 0,",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "      errors: [],",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; rows.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 356
          },

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * User Import Routes",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * Handles bulk import of users from CSV/Excel files",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * Supports importing regular users and notification contacts",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "const express = require('express');",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "const multer = require('multer');",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "const Papa = require('papaparse');",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "const XLSX = require('xlsx');",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "const { User, Company, UserCompany, sequelize } = require('../models');",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "const { Op } = require('sequelize');",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "const auth = require('../middleware/auth');",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "const globalAdmin = require('../middleware/globalAdmin');",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "const { logActivity, ActivityType } = require('../services/activityLogger');",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "const router = express.Router();",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "// Configure multer for file uploads",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "const upload = multer({",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  storage: multer.memoryStorage(),",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  limits: {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    fileSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10MB limit",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  fileFilter: (req, file, cb) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    const allowedMimes = [",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      'text/csv',",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      'application/vnd.ms-excel',",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    ];",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (allowedMimes.includes(file.mimetype) || ",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        file.originalname.endsWith('.csv') || ",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        file.originalname.endsWith('.xls') || ",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        file.originalname.endsWith('.xlsx')) {",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      cb(null, true);",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "      cb(new Error('Invalid file type. Only CSV, XLS, and XLSX files are allowed.'));",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": " * Parse and validate import file",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "async function parseImportFile(file) {",
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  let rows = [];",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\routes\\companies.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 1685
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2472,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 1686
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; sortedRows.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 1863
          },
          {
            "text": " {",
            "lineNumber": 1895
          },
          {
            "text": "          summary.noChange++;",
            "lineNumber": 1896
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 1897
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 1898
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1899
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1900
          },
          {
            "text": "    summary.usersToCreate = uniqueEmails.size;",
            "lineNumber": 1901
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1902
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Column mapping descriptions (support both old and new formats)",
            "lineNumber": 1903
          },
          {
            "text": "    const columnMappings = {",
            "lineNumber": 1904
          },
          {
            "text": "      'id': 'Database ID (UUID) - Primary matching key, falls back to account_no if not present',",
            "lineNumber": 1905
          },
          {
            "text": "      'account_no': 'Account Number - Unique identifier for the company (fallback matching key)',",
            "lineNumber": 1906
          },
          {
            "text": "      'parent_account_no': 'Parent Account Number - Empty for top-level CORP, otherwise references parent',",
            "lineNumber": 1907
          },
          {
            "text": "      'company_name': 'Company Name - Required',",
            "lineNumber": 1908
          },
          {
            "text": "      'type': 'Company Type - CORP (Corporate/Parent), SUB (Subsidiary), or BRANCH',",
            "lineNumber": 1909
          },
          {
            "text": "      'active': 'Active Status - TRUE or FALSE',",
            "lineNumber": 1910
          },
          {
            "text": "      'edi': 'EDI Enabled - TRUE or FALSE (if TRUE, email notifications are disabled)',",
            "lineNumber": 1911
          },
          {
            "text": "      'primary_email': 'Primary Email Contact - Creates notification contact user',",
            "lineNumber": 1912
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Legacy column names for backward compatibility",
            "lineNumber": 1913
          },
          {
            "text": "      'CUSTOMER': 'Account Number (legacy)',",
            "lineNumber": 1914
          },
          {
            "text": "      'PARENT': 'Parent Account Number (legacy)',",
            "lineNumber": 1915
          },
          {
            "text": "      'CNME': 'Company Name (legacy)',",
            "lineNumber": 1916
          },
          {
            "text": "      'TYPE': 'Company Type (legacy)'",
            "lineNumber": 1917
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 1918
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1919
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.json({",
            "lineNumber": 1920
          },
          {
            "text": "      preview: previewData,",
            "lineNumber": 1921
          },
          {
            "text": "      summary,",
            "lineNumber": 1922
          },
          {
            "text": "      totalRows: rows.length,",
            "lineNumber": 1923
          },
          {
            "text": "      columnNames: columnNames,",
            "lineNumber": 1924
          },
          {
            "text": "      columnMappings: columnMappings",
            "lineNumber": 1925
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 1926
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1927
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 1928
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Error previewing import:', error);",
            "lineNumber": 1929
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });",
            "lineNumber": 1930
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 1931
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 1932
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1933
          },
          {
            "text": "router.post('/import', auth, upload.single('file'), async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 1934
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'].includes(req.user.role)) {",
            "lineNumber": 1935
          },
          {
            "text": "    return res.status(403).json({ ",
            "lineNumber": 1936
          },
          {
            "text": "      message: 'Access denied. Manager privileges or above required.' ",
            "lineNumber": 1937
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 1938
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 1939
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1940
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 1941
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!req.file) {",
            "lineNumber": 1942
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No file uploaded' });",
            "lineNumber": 1943
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1944
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1945
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Parse file",
            "lineNumber": 1946
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rows = await parseAndValidateImportFile(req.file);",
            "lineNumber": 1947
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1948
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get all existing companies by referenceNo for matching",

          {
            "text": "    const existingCompanies = await Company.findAll({",

          {
            "text": "      include: [",

          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 1952
          },
          {
            "text": "          model: Company,",
            "lineNumber": 1953
          },
          {
            "text": "          as: 'parent',",

          },
          {
            "text": "          attributes: ['id', 'name'],",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 1957
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 1965
          },

    {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " (",

          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;div className=\"mb-3\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;label className=\"form-label\"&gt;Select File ({importType === 'companies' ? 'CSV, XLS, XLSX, or JSON' : 'CSV, XLS, or XLSX'})&lt;/label&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;input",
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "                      type=\"file\"",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "text": "                      className=\"form-control\"",
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "                      accept={importType === 'companies' ? '.csv,.xls,.xlsx,.json' : '.csv,.xls,.xlsx'}",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "                      onChange={handleFileSelect}",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "                    /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;small className=\"form-hint\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "                      Supported formats: {importType === 'companies' ? 'CSV, XLS, XLSX, JSON' : 'CSV, XLS, XLSX'}. File size limit: 10MB",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;/small&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;h4&gt;File Format Requirements:&lt;/h4&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "text": "                    {importType === 'companies' ? (",
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;&gt;",

          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;p className=\"mb-2\"&gt;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 1490
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1553
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1558
          },
          {
            "text": "      details: { ",
            "lineNumber": 1559
          },
          {
            "text": "        deletedUserId: validatedUserId,",
            "lineNumber": 1560
          },
          {
            "text": "        deletedUserName: deletedUserName,",
            "lineNumber": 1561
          },
          {
            "text": "        deletedUserEmail: deletedUserEmail,",
            "lineNumber": 1562
          },
          {
            "text": "        deletedUserRole: deletedUserRole,",
            "lineNumber": 1563
          },
          {
            "text": "        reason: deleteReason",
            "lineNumber": 1564
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 1565
          },
          {
            "text": "      companyId: null,",
            "lineNumber": 1566
          },
          {
            "text": "      companyName: null,",
            "lineNumber": 1567
          },
          {
            "text": "      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,",
            "lineNumber": 1568
          },
          {
            "text": "      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')",
            "lineNumber": 1569
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 1570
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 1571
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.json({ message: 'User deleted successfully' });",
            "lineNumber": 1572
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 1573
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('[Delete User] Error:', error.message);",
            "lineNumber": 1574
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('[Delete User] Stack:', error.stack);",
            "lineNumber": 1575
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });",
            "lineNumber": 1576
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 1577
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 1578
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1579
          },
          {
            "text": "// Remove 2FA from user (admin only)",
            "lineNumber": 1580
          },
          {
            "text": "router.delete('/:id/two-factor', canManageUsers, async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 1581
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 1582
          },
          {
            "text": "    const userId = req.params.id;",
            "lineNumber": 1583
          },
          {
            "text": "    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');",
            "lineNumber": 1584
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!validation.valid) {",
            "lineNumber": 1585
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });",
            "lineNumber": 1586
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1587
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 1588
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Validate req.user.userId exists",
            "lineNumber": 1589
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!req.user || !req.user.userId) {",
            "lineNumber": 1590
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Authentication required' });",
            "lineNumber": 1591
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1592
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 1593
          },
          {
            "text": "    const currentUser = await User.findByPk(req.user.userId);",
            "lineNumber": 1594
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!currentUser) {",
            "lineNumber": 1595
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Current user not found' });",
            "lineNumber": 1596
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1597
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1598
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Only global_admin, administrator, and manager can remove 2FA",
            "lineNumber": 1599
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'].includes(currentUser.role)) {",
            "lineNumber": 1600
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });",
            "lineNumber": 1601
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1602
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1603
          },
          {
            "text": "    const targetUser = await User.findByPk(userId);",
            "lineNumber": 1604
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!targetUser) {",
            "lineNumber": 1605
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });",
            "lineNumber": 1606
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1607
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1608
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Check if current user can manage this user (global admins can manage all roles)",
            "lineNumber": 1609
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!canManageRole(currentUser.role, targetUser.role)) {",
            "lineNumber": 1610
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });",
            "lineNumber": 1611
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 1612
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1613
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Remove 2FA",
            "lineNumber": 1614
          },
          {
            "text": "    targetUser.twoFactorSecret = null;",
            "lineNumber": 1615
          },
          {
            "text": "    targetUser.twoFactorEnabled = false;",
            "lineNumber": 1616
          },
          {
            "text": "    targetUser.twoFactorVerified = false;",
            "lineNumber": 1617
          },
          {
            "text": "    targetUser.twoFactorMethod = null;",
            "lineNumber": 1618
          },
          {
            "text": "    targetUser.emailTwoFactorCode = null;",
            "lineNumber": 1619
          },
          {
            "text": "    targetUser.emailTwoFactorExpires = null;",
            "lineNumber": 1620
          },
          {
            "text": "    await targetUser.save();",
            "lineNumber": 1621
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1622
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Log 2FA removal",
            "lineNumber": 1623
          },
          {
            "text": "    await logActivity",
            "lineNumber": 1624
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1639
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 1645
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.40665289759635925
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\routes\\users.js",
        "range": {

              "endPosition": {

              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 2159
          },
          {
            "text": " * Import users from CSV/XLS/XLSX file",
            "lineNumber": 2160
          },
          {
            "text": " * POST /api/users/import",
            "lineNumber": 2161
          },
          {
            "text": " * ",
            "lineNumber": 2162
          },
          {
            "text": " * Creates new users or updates existing ones.",
            "lineNumber": 2163
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Matches by ID first (if provided), then falls back to email",
            "lineNumber": 2164
          },
          {
            "text": " * - New users get a welcome email with temporary password",
            "lineNumber": 2165
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Email changes trigger validation flow (user must verify new email)",
            "lineNumber": 2166
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Companies are assigned by account number (referenceNo)",
            "lineNumber": 2167
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 2168
          },
          {
            "text": "router.post('/import', canManageUsers, upload.single('file'), async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 2169
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 2170
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!req.file) {",
            "lineNumber": 2171
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No file uploaded' });",
            "lineNumber": 2172
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 2173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2174
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rows = await parseUserImportFile(req.file);",
            "lineNumber": 2175
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2176
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get all existing users for matching",
            "lineNumber": 2177
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsers = await User.findAll({",
            "lineNumber": 2178
          },
          {
            "text": "      attributes: ['id', 'name', 'email', 'role', 'isActive', 'allCompanies',",
            "lineNumber": 2179
          },
          {
            "text": "        'sendInvoiceEmail', 'sendInvoiceAttachment', 'sendStatementEmail',",
            "lineNumber": 2180
          },
          {
            "text": "        'sendStatementAttachment', 'sendEmailAsSummary', 'sendImportSummaryReport']",
            "lineNumber": 2181
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 2182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2183
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsersMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 2184
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsersByIdMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 2185
          },
          {
            "text": "    existingUsers.forEach(user =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 2186
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (user.email) {",
            "lineNumber": 2187
          },
          {
            "text": "        existingUsersMap.set(user.email.toLowerCase(), user);",
            "lineNumber": 2188
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 2189
          },
          {
            "text": "      existingUsersByIdMap.set(user.id, user);",
            "lineNumber": 2190
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 2191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2192
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get all existing companies for company assignment lookup",
            "lineNumber": 2193
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingCompanies = await Company.findAll({",
            "lineNumber": 2194
          },
          {
            "text": "      attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo']",
            "lineNumber": 2195
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 2196
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingCompaniesMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 2197
          },
          {
            "text": "    existingCompanies.forEach(company =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 2198
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (company.referenceNo) {",
            "lineNumber": 2199
          },
          {
            "text": "        existingCompaniesMap.set(company.referenceNo, company);",
            "lineNumber": 2200
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 2201
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 2202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2203
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get manageable roles for current user",
            "lineNumber": 2204
          },
          {
            "text": "    const manageableRoles = getManageableRoles(req.user.role);",
            "lineNumber": 2205
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 2569
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3976573944091797
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const ImportData = ",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 828
          },
          {
            "text": "                    {importType === 'companies' &amp;&amp; importTransactionId &amp;&amp; (",
            "lineNumber": 829
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;button",
            "lineNumber": 830
          },
          {
            "text": "                        type=\"button\"",
            "lineNumber": 831
          },
          {
            "text": "                        className=\"btn btn-warning\"",
            "lineNumber": 832
          },
          {
            "text": "                        onClick={handleUndoImport}",
            "lineNumber": 833
          },

            "lineNumber": 834
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 835
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 836
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;/button&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 837
          },
          {
            "text": "                    )}",
            "lineNumber": 838
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;button",
            "lineNumber": 839
          },
          {
            "text": "                      type=\"button\"",
            "lineNumber": 840
          },
          {
            "text": "                      className=\"btn btn-primary\"",
            "lineNumber": 841
          },
          {
            "text": "                      onClick={resetImport}",
            "lineNumber": 842
          },
          {
            "text": "                      disabled={undoing}",
            "lineNumber": 843
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 844
          },
          {
            "text": "                      Import Another File",
            "lineNumber": 845
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;/button&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 846
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;button",
            "lineNumber": 847
          },
          {
            "text": "                      type=\"button\"",
            "lineNumber": 848
          },
          {
            "text": "                      className=\"btn btn-secondary\"",
            "lineNumber": 849
          },
          {
            "text": "                      onClick={() =&gt; navigate(importType === 'companies' ? '/companies' : '/users')}",
            "lineNumber": 850
          },
          {
            "text": "                      disabled={undoing}",
            "lineNumber": 851
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 852
          },
          {
            "text": "                      Go to {importType === 'companies' ? 'Companies' : 'Users'}",
            "lineNumber": 853
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;/button&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 854
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 855
          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;/&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 856
          },
          {
            "text": "              )}",
            "lineNumber": 857
          },
          {
            "text": "            &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 858
          },
          {
            "text": "          &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 859
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 860
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 861
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 862
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 863
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 864
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 865
          },
          {
            "text": "export default ImportData;",
            "lineNumber": 866
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3939788341522217
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\routes\\users.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 1786
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2156,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 1907,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 1907,
                "column": 1
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 1907,
                "column": 71
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 1908,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async function processUserRowForPreview(row, rowNum, existingUsersMap, existingUsersByIdMap, existingCompaniesMap, manageableRoles) {",
            "lineNumber": 1787,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1955
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1956
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Check if email is being changed",
            "lineNumber": 1957
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (existingUser.email.toLowerCase() !== trimmedEmail) {",
            "lineNumber": 1958
          },
          {
            "text": "        result.emailChangeRequired = true;",
            "lineNumber": 1959
          },
          {
            "text": "        result.warnings.push(&#96;Email will change from ${existingUser.email} to ${trimmedEmail}. User will receive validation email.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 1960
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 1961
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1962
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Check if role is being changed",
            "lineNumber": 1963
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (existingUser.role !== role) {",
            "lineNumber": 1964
          },
          {
            "text": "        result.warnings.push(&#96;Role will change from ${getRoleLabel(existingUser.role)} to ${getRoleLabel(role)}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 1965
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 1966
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 1967
          },
          {
            "text": "      result.action = 'create';",
            "lineNumber": 1968
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Check if email already exists (duplicate in file)",
            "lineNumber": 1969
          },
          {
            "text": "      const emailCheck = existingUsersMap.get(trimmedEmail);",
            "lineNumber": 1970
          },
          {

            "text": "/**",

          {

          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": " * Preview import endpoint",

          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "router.post('/preview', globalAdmin, upload.single('file'), async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No file uploaded' });",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rows = await parseImportFile(req.file);",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get existing users by email",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsers = await User.findAll();",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingUsersMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const user of existingUsers) {",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "      existingUsersMap.set(user.email.toLowerCase(), user);",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Get existing companies by referenceNo and code",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingCompanies = await Company.findAll();",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "    const existingCompaniesMap = new Map();",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const company of existingCompanies) {",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (company.referenceNo) {",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "        existingCompaniesMap.set(company.referenceNo, company);",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Process each row for preview",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    const previewData = [];",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "    const summary = {",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "      total: rows.length,",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "      toCreate: 0,",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "      toUpdate: 0,",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "      errors: 0,",

          },
          {
            "text": "      warnings: 0",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; rows.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "      const processed = await processRowForPreview(rows[i], i + 1, existingUsersMap, existingCompaniesMap);",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "      previewData.push(processed);",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (processed.status === 'error') {",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "        summary.errors++;",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (processed.status === 'warning') {",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "        summary.warnings++;",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (processed.action === 'create') summary.toCreate++;",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "        else summary.toUpdate++;",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (processed.action === 'create') summary.toCreate++;",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "        else summary.toUpdate++;",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.json({",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "      success: true,",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "      fileName: req.file.originalname,",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "      summary,",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "      preview: previewData",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Error previewing user import:', error);",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": " * Execute import endpoint",

          },

            "text": "const ImportData = ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": " * Process a single row for preview",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "async function processRowForPreview(row, rowNum, existingUsersMap, existingCompaniesMap) {",
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const result = {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    rowNum,",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    status: 'valid',",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "    errors: [],",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    warnings: [],",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    action: 'create',",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    data: {},",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "    existingData: null",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Extract fields with flexible column matching",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "  const name = getRowValue(row, ['Name', 'Full Name', 'FullName', 'User Name', 'UserName']);",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "  const email = getRowValue(row, ['Email', 'Email Address', 'EmailAddress', 'E-mail']);",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "  const role = getRowValue(row, ['Role', 'User Role', 'UserRole', 'Type']);",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "  const allCompaniesStr = getRowValue(row, ['All Companies', 'AllCompanies', 'All Accounts', 'AllAccounts']);",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "  const companyCodes = getRowValue(row, ['Company Codes', 'CompanyCodes', 'Companies', 'Account Numbers', 'Accounts']);",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "  const sendInvoiceEmailStr = getRowValue(row, ['Send Invoice Email', 'SendInvoiceEmail', 'Invoice Email', 'Send Upload Email']);",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "  const sendInvoiceAttachmentStr = getRowValue(row, ['With Attachment', 'WithAttachment', 'Invoice Attachment', 'Send Attachment']);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "  const sendStatementEmailStr = getRowValue(row, ['Send Statement Email', 'SendStatementEmail', 'Statement Email']);",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "  const sendStatementAttachmentStr = getRowValue(row, ['Statement Attachment', 'StatementAttachment']);",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "  const sendSummaryStr = getRowValue(row, ['Send Summary', 'SendSummary', 'Summary Email', 'Send Email As Summary']);",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Validate required fields",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!name || !name.trim()) {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    result.errors.push('Name is required');",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    result.status = 'error';",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!email || !email.trim()) {",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    result.errors.push('Email is required');",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    result.status = 'error';",

Summary of what’s in place and what was changed:

### Already working for Managers
- **Import Data page access** – The route uses `IMPORT_DATA_VIEW`, which already includes `manager` (with `global_admin`, `credit_senior`, `credit_controller`) in both frontend and backend.
- **Import Accounts (Companies)** – In `backend/routes/companies.js`, `/import/preview` and `/import` explicitly allow `['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager']`, so managers can import companies.
- **Import Users** – The requests from the Import Data page go to `/api/users/import/preview` and `/api/users/import`. Those are handled by `backend/routes/users.js`, which uses `canManageUsers`; `canManageUsers` uses `canAddUsers`, which already includes `manager` in `backend/utils/roleHierarchy.js`, so managers can import users.

### Changes made
1. **`backend/routes/userImport.js`**  
   The separate user-import router (mounted at `/api/users/import`) was using `globalAdmin`, so only Global Admins could use that path. It’s now aligned with the permission model:
   - Replaced `globalAdmin` with `auth` + `requirePermission('USERS_IMPORT')`.
   - Applied to: `POST /preview`, `POST /` (execute import), and `GET /template`.
   - `USERS_IMPORT` in `backend/utils/permissions.js` is already granted to `['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager']`, so managers are allowed.

2. **`frontend/src/App.js`**  
   Updated the route comment from “GA only” to “Managers and above can import Accounts & Users” so it matches the actual permission.

Result:
- **Accounts**: Managers could already import; no code change was required.
- **Users**: Either the main `users.js` routes (already manager-allowed) or the `userImport.js` routes (now manager-allowed via `USERS_IMPORT`) are used; in both cases managers can import users.
- **Import Data page**: Still gated by `IMPORT_DATA_VIEW`, which already includes manager; the “Import Data” nav item is shown to managers via `hasPermission('IMPORT_DATA_VIEW')` in the layout.

Managers should now be able to open the Import Data page and use both **Companies** and **Users** import without further changes. If something still blocks them (e.g. a 403 or hidden UI), describe what they see and we can trace that path next.

Summary of what was wrong and what was changed:

**What was happening**  
On [Import Data](https://edi.makitauk.com/import-data), when a **Manager** imported a CSV that had users with role **Manager**, the backend rejected those rows with:

**"You cannot import users with role: Manager"**

The import uses **manageable roles**: the logged-in user is only allowed to import users whose role they are allowed to manage. The hierarchy logic said that a Manager could only manage roles **below** Manager (Credit Senior, Credit Controller, External User, Notification Contact), not the Manager role itself. So any row with role "Manager" was correctly rejected by that rule.

**What was changed**  
In `backend/utils/roleHierarchy.js`:

1. **`getManageableRoles`**  
   For users with role **manager**, the code now returns roles **at or below** Manager (Manager, Credit Senior, Credit Controller, External User, Notification Contact), so Managers can import users with role "Manager" as well as lower roles.

2. **`canManageRole`**  
   For consistency, a Manager can now manage another Manager (same “at or below” rule). This keeps behaviour aligned for import and for editing users elsewhere (e.g. User Management).

After deploying this change, Managers can:

- Import users whose role is **Manager** (and any lower role) on the Import Data page without seeing “You cannot import users with role: Manager”.
- Edit other Manager users in the UI where role-based checks use `canManageRole` / `getManageableRoles`.

Redeploy the backend (or restart the Node process) so the updated `roleHierarchy.js` is in effect; no frontend or DB changes are required.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Found the bug. In **Invoices.js** (the list page), `handleDownloadInvoice` does:

1. **First**: `api.post(`/api/invoices/${invoiceId}/view`)` - marks as VIEWED (fire and forget)
2. **Then**: `fetch(url)` for the download endpoint

So the sequence is: View API is called first (sets status to 'viewed'), then Download API is called (would set status to 'downloaded'). But because the view is "fire and forget", it might complete after the download request, or there could be a race. Actually wait - if view is called first and completes first, status becomes 'viewed'. Then download is called and should set it to 'downloaded'. So the download endpoint should overwrite to 'downloaded'. Unless... the view request is sent and the download request is sent, and they're both async. So we have:
- Request 1: POST /view (starts)
- Request 2: GET /download (starts)
If Request 1 completes after Request 2, then we'd have: download set status to 'downloaded', then view overwrites to 'viewed'! That's the race condition. The "mark as viewed" call should NOT be made when the user is downloading. We should only call /view when they're viewing (e.g. opening the PDF in browser), not when they're explicitly downloading.

So the fix: In Invoices.js, remove the "Mark as viewed first" call from handleDownloadInvoice. When they download, only the download endpoint should be hit, which will set status to 'downloaded' (and also set viewedAt if not set). We should NOT call /view when downloading.

Let me also check Credit Notes list page to see how they do it - user said credit notes are working.
</details></think>

- When user clicks **View** (e.g. opens PDF in tab): call view endpoint or view-pdf. That sets status to 'viewed'.

So the fix is to remove the "mark as viewed" call from both Invoices and Credit Notes download handlers. That way:

---


Summary of what was wrong and what was changed:

**What was wrong**

On the **Invoices** list, when an external user clicked **Download**, the frontend did two things:

1. Called **POST `/api/invoices/:id/view`** (mark as viewed) – “fire and forget”
2. Called **GET `/api/invoices/:id/download`** (download file)

Because both run async, the view request could finish **after** the download request. The download endpoint correctly set status to `downloaded`, but the view endpoint could overwrite it to `viewed`, so the document sometimes stayed (or ended up) as **Viewed** instead of **Downloaded**.

**What was changed**

1. **`frontend/src/pages/Invoices.js`**  
   The extra **“mark as viewed”** call was removed from the download handler. When the user clicks Download, only the download endpoint is called, so the backend can set status to **Downloaded** and it is not overwritten by a view call.

2. **`frontend/src/pages/CreditNotes.js`**  
   The same **“mark as viewed”** call was removed from the credit note download handler so behaviour matches invoices and to avoid the same race on credit notes.

**Resulting behaviour**

- **Download** (list or detail): only the **download** endpoint is called → status becomes **Downloaded** (and the backend sets `viewedAt` if needed).
- **View** (open detail page or “View PDF”): **GET single invoice** or **view-pdf** is used → status becomes **Viewed** when appropriate.

So:

- **Download** → status **Downloaded**
- **View (only)** → status **Viewed**

After deploying the updated frontend, external users downloading from the list or detail should see status **Downloaded**; credit notes stay consistent with the same logic.
